metadata.name: Process Dunning Notices for Overdue Accounts

description: The collections specialist needs to run the weekly dunning process to send reminders for overdue invoices.

nodes.task_description: Generate a list of all customers with invoices that are more than 30 days past due.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates a list of delinquent accounts.

nodes.task_description: For each customer on the list, generate the appropriate dunning letter based on the age of the oldest invoice (e.g., 30-day gentle reminder, 60-day firm notice).

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates the correct level of dunning letter for each customer.

nodes.task_description: Send the dunning letters to the customers.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully emails or queues the letters for mailing.
